def check_permissions(user: dict) -> None:
    if not user.get("is_active"):
        return None
    if user.get("role") != "admin":
        return None


def find_item(items: list[dict], target_id: str) -> None:
    for item in items:
        if item["id"] == target_id:
            return None


def process_if_valid(data: dict) -> None:
    if "key" not in data:
        return None
    value = data["key"]
    if value < 0:
        return None
